div1.entryFree: Boast, subst., expression of ostentation or pride: my b. is true, Compl. 246. Mids. I, 1, 103. As IV, 3, 91. Oth. V, 2, 264. Cymb. II, 3, 116. V, 5, 162. Per. IV, 6, 195. my resolution shall be thy b. Lucr. 1193. I could make as true a b. as that, H5 III, 7, 66. when every thing doth make a gleeful b. Tit. II, 3, 11, i. e. shows its joy exultingly. Followed by of: his b. of Lucrece' sovereignty, Lucr. 36. make no b. of it, Ado III, 3, 20. As II, 5, 38. Followed by an infin.: cannot make b. to have, Troil. III, 3, 98.
